payload.answer: I could not save this as an article memory because the URL could not be fetched and no article content was provided. I will not infer or invent claims about the article.

entity_resolution.reason: The provided article URL appears malformed and the mock fetch result indicates a 404/network error, so no durable article facts can be safely stored.

details: No article content was available to verify or store.

repair_options: Provide a valid, fetchable article URL.
Paste the article title and relevant excerpt or summary to remember.
Clarify what specific information from the article should be stored.
